tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(def linear-ids (set (keep :closes_linear prs)))
(def linear-states (into {} (map (juxt :id :state)) (linear_issues {:id (vec linear-ids)})))
(def not-done (filter #(and (:closes_linear %)
                            (not= "done" (get linear-states (:closes_linear %))))
                      prs))
{:total (count not-done)

{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(def linear-ids (filter identity (map :closes_linear prs)))
(def linear-states (reduce #(assoc %1 (:id %2) (:state %2)) {} (linear_issues {:id linear-ids})))
(def not-done (filter #(and (:closes_linear %)
                            (not= "done" (get linear-states (:closes_linear %))))
                      prs))
